description: The HomeLocationSetter component duplicates geolocation error handling logic. Extract this into a custom hook (useGeolocation) that returns { getCurrentPosition, loading, error } to make it reusable and testable.
successCriteria: A new custom hook useGeolocation exists in client/src/hooks/
HomeLocationSetter uses the hook instead of inline navigator.geolocation calls
Error handling and timeout logic are encapsulated in the hook
